prompt: Resolve the field tradeoff: distinguish common shortcuts from acceptable journeyman practice.
scenario: In a T1 work setting, the evaluated element is U-301 Equipment safety within 2.11 Sitework & Utilities. The relevant subcategory is 2.11.3 Heavy Equipment Operation. The observed field condition is: no spotter while backing near trench. The work is being assessed at the in-progress lifecycle state with source anchors OSHA 1926 Subpart O.
title: T1 U-301 Tradeoff judgment
